title: First-tier Tribunal (Residential Property Tribunal): Market Rents Weekly Hearing List – Court and Tribunal Hearings – GOV.UK
header: First-tier Tribunal (Residential Property Tribunal): Market Rents Weekly Hearing List
openJustice1: Members of the public wishing to observe a hearing or representatives of the media may, on their request, join any telephone or video hearing remotely while they are taking place by sending an email in advance to the tribunal at  marketrents@justice.gov.uk with the following details in the subject line “[OBSERVER/MEDIA] REQUEST – [case reference] – [hearing date]” and appropriate arrangements will be made to allow access where reasonably practicable.
openJustice2: Observe a court or tribunal hearing as a journalist, researcher or member of the public
openJustice3: For Market Rent applications received before 16 March 2026 please check the relevant regional hearing list(s) or call the Tribunal on 0300 303 5857.
